sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Cuts Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) Price Target to $80.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) from $90.00 to $80.00, maintaining an "underweight" rating on the software maker's stock. This adjustment implies a potential upside of 5.86% from the stock's previous close. Other analysts have also recently updated their ratings, contributing to a consensus "Reduce" rating and an average price target of $96.67 for the company.

feed.title: Onto Innovation schedules May 5 earnings call after market close
feed.summary: Onto Innovation Inc. (NYSE: ONTO) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results shortly after market close on May 5, 2026. The company will host a conference call and audio webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, featuring CEO Michael P. Plisinski and CFO Brian Roberts. Interested parties can access the call via dial-in or live webcast on the company's website.

feed.title: Opera schedules April 28 earnings release and 8 a.m. ET call
feed.summary: Opera (NASDAQ: OPRA) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on April 28, 2026. Management will host a conference call and live webcast on the same day at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results. The earnings release and webcast will be available on investor.opera.com, with dial-in numbers and a confirmation code provided for listeners.

feed.title: Paylocity will detail fiscal Q3 results after market close May 7
feed.summary: Paylocity (NASDAQ: PCTY) has scheduled its Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings conference call for Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 4:00 pm CT (5:00 pm ET). The company will issue a press release with results in advance, and a live webcast will be available on its Investor Relations page, with a replay archived online. Paylocity is a leading provider of cloud-based HR, Finance, and IT solutions, headquartered in Schaumburg, IL.

feed.title: GE HealthCare expands mammography collaboration with RadNet’s DeepHealth subsidiary to extend global access to DeepHealth’s AI-powered breast cancer screening solutions
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has expanded its collaboration with RadNet’s DeepHealth subsidiary to advance and commercialize AI-powered mammography tools globally. This initiative builds on their existing partnership by introducing DeepHealth’s enhanced AI-powered Breast Suite, including ProFound Pro and Safeguard Review, which aims to improve breast cancer detection and operational efficiency in screening programs. The companies will showcase their latest advancements at the SBI Annual Symposium, emphasizing personalized prevention and care for women through AI integration.

feed.title: Three $0.05 monthly payouts set for OFS Credit holders through July
feed.summary: OFS Credit Company (OCCI) has declared monthly cash distributions of $0.05 per share of common stock for May, June, and July 2026. Common stockholders participating in the Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRIP) will receive a 5% discount on shares purchased through reinvested dividends. OFS Credit is an investment company focused on collateralized loan obligation (CLO) equity and debt securities.

feed.title: Wisconsin Electric sets June and July payouts on preferred shares
feed.summary: Wisconsin Electric, a subsidiary of WEC Energy Group, has declared quarterly cash dividends for two series of its preferred shares. Holders of the 3.60% Series will receive $0.90 per share payable on June 1, 2026, while those with Six Per Cent Preferred Stock will receive $1.50 per share payable on July 31, 2026. These dividends provide predictable income to preferred shareholders, with specific record dates set for May 14, 2026, and July 14, 2026, respectively.

feed.title: Georgia Tech and Coca-Cola finalize property agreement, Tech expansion
feed.summary: Georgia Tech and The Coca-Cola Company are finalizing an agreement for Georgia Tech to acquire property along North Avenue, valued at $31.3 million. This acquisition, which includes a two-story brick building and an adjacent two-acre park, will help Georgia Tech meet its expansion needs for academic, research, and student purposes. The move comes as Georgia Tech experiences record enrollment applications and strengthens the long-standing relationship between the two Atlanta institutions.

feed.title: WEC Energy declares $0.9525 dividend
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.9525 per share. Shareholders of record as of April 28, 2026, will receive this dividend on June 01, 2026. This amounts to an annualized dividend of $3.81 and a yield of 4.70%.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Arista Networks (ANET) to $200 from $190, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a potential upside of over 25%. This comes after Arista Networks exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, demonstrating strong year-over-year revenue growth and profitability. Despite significant insider selling activity, the stock has received numerous "Buy" and "Strong Buy" ratings from various analysts.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has Lowered Expectations for Calix (NYSE:CALX) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for Calix (NYSE:CALX) from $90.00 to $70.00 but maintained an "overweight" rating, suggesting a significant upside. Calix recently exceeded earnings estimates with $0.39 EPS on $272.4 million revenue and announced a $125 million share repurchase program. The stock currently trades around $49.63, with analysts giving it a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average consensus price target of $71.67.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group Launches New Philanthropic Foundation
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has officially launched a new philanthropic foundation to formalize its charitable efforts, building on decades of work supporting education, environmental initiatives, and local economies. The foundation's initial project is backing an emergency medicine residency program at Jackson Health System in South Florida. This initiative aligns with the company's broader "SEA the Future" framework, focusing on sustainability, community, and innovation, and highlights Royal Caribbean's long-standing commitment to global communities.

feed.title: Is Vertex Pharmaceuticals' Empire in Trouble?
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals faces potential challenges to its cystic fibrosis (CF) drug market dominance as other companies develop competing treatments, including gene therapies that could treat a wider patient population. Despite these threats and aggressive competition in the CF pipeline, Vertex's core franchise remains secure for the near future, and the company is actively diversifying its product lineup with new approvals in other disease areas. This strategic expansion aims to mitigate risks from future CF competition, making Vertex Pharmaceuticals an attractive stock, according to the article.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer Faces Federal Securities Lawsuit Over Alleged Export Control Violations and China Server Sales
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer is facing a federal securities lawsuit alleging that the company and two executives concealed risks related to billions of dollars in server sales ultimately diverted to China through an export-control evasion scheme. The lawsuit was filed after the Department of Justice unsealed an indictment against three individuals connected to Super Micro for their alleged involvement in systematically diverting AI-capable servers to Chinese customers without proper licenses. As a result, the company's stock fell significantly, causing investors to suffer substantial losses, and shareholders are encouraged to assess their legal options.

feed.title: Devon Energy (DVN) Shares Rise 1.77% as Analysts Remain Bullish
feed.summary: Devon Energy (DVN) saw its stock rise by 1.77% after a six-day losing streak, reaching $46.03. This rally is attributed to investor confidence amid geopolitical tensions driving oil prices and the positive impact of its merger with Coterra Energy, which expands its presence in the Appalachian Basin. Despite analysts giving it a "Hold" rating, many recommend a "Buy" due to strong profitability and a potentially undervalued P/E ratio, further supported by the company's solid GF Score™ of 75/100.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase (AMJB) offers $9M 4.50% callable notes, callable 2028–2030
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is offering $9 million in callable fixed-rate notes due April 17, 2031, with an annual interest rate of 4.50%. The notes are callable by the issuer on specific April and October dates between 2028 and 2030. Investors should be aware of risks including potential early redemption, credit risk of JPMorgan Chase, and subordination of claims in resolution scenarios as per resolution planning strategies.

feed.title: Longview Asset Management updates GENERAL DYNAMICS (GD) insider status with no trades
feed.summary: Longview Asset Management, LLC, a former 10% owner of GENERAL DYNAMICS (GD), has filed a Form 4 to update its insider status. The filing indicates no common stock or derivative transactions, signifying a routine ownership update rather than a new buy or sell event. This Form 4 merely clarifies Longview's continued status as an insider, albeit one no longer actively trading GD shares.

feed.title: 95.25 cents a share: WEC extends dividend streak to 335 quarters
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) has declared a quarterly cash dividend totaling 95.25 cents per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 14, 2026. This announcement extends the company's continuous dividend payment streak to 335 consecutive quarters, dating back to 1942. WEC Energy Group, a Fortune 500 company, serves 4.8 million customers across multiple states and boasts approximately $51 billion in assets.

feed.title: Mission-critical security cannot be bolted on, says Oracle
feed.summary: Oracle asserts that mission-critical security must be inherently built into the database rather than added later, especially with the rise of agentic AI. Ashish Ray, SVP of product management at Oracle, highlighted that autonomous AI tasks require resilience that is baked into the system, emphasizing that old enterprise security protocols are no longer sufficient. The new Oracle AI Database 26ai introduces Platinum and Diamond tiers, significantly reducing failover times to ensure high availability and data protection for AI and agentic workloads.

feed.title: Monolithic Power Systems, Impinj, Microchip Technology, and Texas Instruments Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Monolithic Power Systems, Impinj, Microchip Technology, and Texas Instruments jumped in the afternoon session after industry bellwether Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC) reported a substantial 58% increase in quarterly profit. TSMC's strong performance, driven by booming demand for artificial intelligence (AI), signals robust demand across the global chip market and lifted sentiment for other semiconductor companies. Monolithic Power Systems, in particular, saw its shares increase by 3.2% and has already gained 49.8% since the beginning of the year, setting a new 52-week high.

feed.title: Regeneron’s Dupixent Win And Telix Deal Add New Layers To Valuation
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals has broadened its immunology and oncology reach with the recent EU approval of Dupixent for pediatric chronic spontaneous urticaria and a new radiopharmaceuticals collaboration with Telix Pharmaceuticals. These developments offer new potential revenue streams and diversify the company's product and partnership portfolio. Despite these positive updates, the stock has shown little recent momentum and currently trades below analyst targets, although Simply Wall St valuation suggests it is significantly undervalued.

feed.title: Walmart to remodel 13 Georgia stores as retailer aims to modernize
feed.summary: Walmart plans to renovate 13 stores in Georgia as part of a larger modernization effort across its U.S. locations. The retailer has made significant investments in the state. This initiative comes amidst broader developments in the retail sector, including other companies opening new stores and expanding delivery services.

feed.title: TD (TD) launches 26‑month MSCI EAFE® notes — 15% buffer, 160% leverage
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank (TD) has launched new structured senior notes linked to the MSCI EAFE® Index, featuring a 26-month term maturing on June 16, 2028. These notes offer a 15% buffer against declines, a 160% leverage factor for positive performance up to a cap, and a maximum payment of $1,329.44 per $1,000 principal. Investors should be aware that the notes are unsecured, not FDIC/CDIC insured, and involve credit and tax risks, with possible loss of entire principal if the index falls significantly.

feed.title: IQVIA stock falls as OpenAI unveils AI drug discovery model
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings (NYSE: IQV) shares fell 2% after OpenAI announced its entry into AI-driven drug discovery with GPT-Rosalind, a new model for life sciences research. The model aims to help researchers extract insights from data and convert scientific studies into healthcare applications. Initial users include Amgen, Moderna, and the Allen Institute, signaling OpenAI's push into applied AI for scientific breakthroughs.

feed.title: CH Robinson Worldwide Inc Stock (CHRW) Moved Up by 8.29% on Apr 16: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) stock saw an 8.29% increase on April 16, driven primarily by investor anticipation of its Q1 2026 earnings report and confidence in its productivity and margin-improvement strategies, including "Lean AI" and AI-enabled automation. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus, despite some short-term uncertainties. The company also emphasizes shareholder returns through share repurchases, contributing to the positive sentiment.

feed.title: Does Northern Dynasty Minerals’ (TSX:NDM) EPA Court Challenge Reframe Its Long-Term Permitting Risk Profile?
feed.summary: Northern Dynasty Minerals (TSX:NDM) has filed a response brief in Alaska Federal Court, challenging the EPA's veto of its Pebble Project, arguing the action is unlawful and inconsistent with the project's environmental statement. This legal challenge underscores the company's reliance on legal, rather than operational, catalysts and raises the stakes on its permitting risk, as the company currently has no revenue and faces going concern warnings. While investor sentiment suggests the market views this legal push as significant, the outcome will heavily influence the project's long-term viability and the company's financial sustainability.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Appoints New Chief Legal Officer
feed.summary: Brown & Brown Inc. has formally appointed Eileen Akerson as its new chief legal officer, effective immediately. Akerson, who previously served in an interim capacity and as chief risk, regulatory and compliance counsel, will lead the company's legal, regulatory, compliance, and enterprise risk management efforts. This appointment recognizes her extensive experience and leadership within the organization.

feed.title: People Moves: Raymond James Appoints New COO for Private Client Group
feed.summary: Raymond James has appointed Patrick O’Connor as the new Chief Operating Officer for its U.S. Private Client Group, overseeing growth initiatives and strategy. This article also details several other significant personnel changes within the wealth management industry, including a former Microsoft executive joining Osaic's technology team, Orion hiring a new leader for wealth management sales, and Carson Group recruiting a business development executive from Dynasty. Additionally, Falcon Wealth Planning brought on a Fidelity veteran for growth initiatives, and Great Valley Advisor Group promoted Todd Cipperman to Chief Growth Officer.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess 3M (MMM) After Mixed Share Price Performance?
feed.summary: 3M (MMM) has shown mixed share price performance recently, with returns of 1.4% over 7 days, 0.9% over 30 days, a 6.5% decline year to date, and 18.1% over the past year. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 28.9%, with an estimated intrinsic value of $212.80 per share compared to its current price of $151.24. The article also provides bull and bear case narratives, offering a range of potential valuations for investors to consider based on different assumptions and risk factors like PFAS litigation.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands Upskilling Push Tests Link Between Talent And Earnings Power
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) has launched new upskilling programs, including an AI skills program and training for culinary and management staff, across its operations in the US and Macao. These initiatives aim to enhance service quality, operational efficiency, and leadership development, which are crucial for integrated resorts relying on technology and specialized roles. While the financial impact is yet to be determined, these programs could improve competitiveness against rivals like Wynn Resorts and MGM Resorts, and support long-term earnings potential by addressing guest expectations and operational complexities.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Medpace Holdings, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Medpace Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: MEDP) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and February 9, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Medpace made misleading statements regarding its projected book-to-bill ratio and the impact of cancellations, leading to a nearly 16% drop in stock price after the company released fourth-quarter 2025 earnings with a significantly lower-than-guidance book-to-bill ratio. Investors have until June 8, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: Why Is Opendoor (OPEN) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
feed.summary: Opendoor (OPEN) stock rose 7.5% today after SRx Health Solutions and EMJ Crypto Technologies announced an increased investment in the company, signaling positive market sentiment. Opendoor also plans to report its Q1 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026. The stock remains highly volatile and is down 14.3% year-to-date, trading significantly below its 52-week high amidst broader concerns about consumer sentiment and inflation.

feed.title: Why Northwest Pipe (NWPX) Shares Are Sliding Today
feed.summary: Shares of Northwest Pipe (NWPX) fell 3.8% after peer Insteel Industries reported disappointing second-quarter 2026 results, signaling potential weakness in the construction and infrastructure sector. Insteel's gross profit and margin decreased due to reduced spreads, lower shipment volumes, and higher operating costs. This has led investors to worry about similar challenges for Northwest Pipe, despite its stock being up 26.6% year-to-date.

feed.title: U.S. Bank earnings jump; executives share impact of new Amazon card deal
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp reported $1.95 billion in Q1 earnings, and its executives discussed the significant impact of the new Amazon card deal. This deal is expected to bring in approximately $1.6 billion in loans and generate $75 million to $85 million per quarter once fully finalized. The Minneapolis/St. Paul Business Journal provided an update on April 16, 2026, highlighting these financial developments.

feed.title: PPG (PPG) Sr VP Braun receives new phantom stock unit award
feed.summary: PPG Industries' Senior VP of Operations, Kevin D. Braun, was granted 1.6612 phantom stock units at a reference price of $107.72 each. This award, part of the company's Deferred Compensation Plan, increases his total holdings to 863.5741 phantom stock units. These units convert into PPG common stock shares one-for-one upon termination of employment and reflect an interest in an unfunded unitized company stock fund.

feed.title: Costco Raises Its Dividend 13%. Why Gas Prices Matter More for the Stock.
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale has announced a 13% dividend increase. However, investors are more keenly watching factors like gas prices and customer traffic, which are considered more significant drivers of the retailer's growth and stock performance.

feed.title: AMD Rips Higher As TSMC's Blowout Guide Lights Up The Stock
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock surged after its foundry partner, TSMC, reported record profits and raised its 2026 revenue growth guidance to over 30%, driven by "insatiable" AI infrastructure demand. Bernstein analysts also boosted AMD's price target to $265, citing stronger server demand and the Meta AI deal, projecting significant revenue growth for AMD in 2026 and 2027. AMD shares were up 6.05% and are trading near their 52-week high, though in overbought territory.

feed.title: Monolithic Power Systems, Impinj, Microchip Technology, and Texas Instruments Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Monolithic Power Systems, Impinj, Microchip Technology, and Texas Instruments surged following robust earnings and optimistic forecasts from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC). TSMC reported a 58% jump in quarterly profit, driven by strong demand for AI-related computing chips, signaling a healthy outlook for the semiconductor industry. This positive news boosted investor confidence in other analog semiconductor companies, with Monolithic Power Systems hitting a new 52-week high.

feed.title: What's Going On With The Rise In ServiceNow Stock?
feed.summary: ServiceNow shares are experiencing an upward trend despite a general "selective risk-on" market and a valuation that leans premium with weak momentum. Several analysts have reiterated "Buy" ratings but lowered price targets, indicating cautious optimism. The stock's technical analysis suggests a bearish momentum with resistance at $111.00 and support at $81.00, while its growth profile remains strong according to Benzinga Edge.

feed.title: DSV, Microsoft, United & Phillips 66 unlock 11M gallons of SAF for lower emissions
feed.summary: DSV, Microsoft, United Airlines, and Phillips 66 have partnered to secure up to 11 million gallons of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), aiming to reduce lifecycle greenhouse gas emissions by approximately 100,000 tonnes. This collaboration aligns demand, commercial terms, and operations to accelerate SAF adoption. United Airlines will utilize the fuel, while DSV and Microsoft will use a book-and-claim system to account for emissions reductions, demonstrating a collaborative supply chain effort to scale SAF and lower environmental impact.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks joins UAH Invention to Innovation Center as Corporate Innovation Partner
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks has partnered with the University of Alabama in Huntsville's Invention to Innovation Center (I²C) to expand collaboration in cybersecurity, AI, and mission-focused technology development. This partnership will provide UAH students with internships, co-ops, and training, and establish a North Alabama base for Palo Alto Networks to work with university researchers and industry partners. The initiative aims to accelerate the translation of university research into deployable technologies and support economic development by creating high-quality technology jobs.
feed.source: The University of Alabama in Huntsville
feed.source_domain: The University of Alabama in Huntsville

feed.title: NIO (NIO) Reports March Deliveries of 35,486 Vehicles
feed.summary: NIO Inc. (NYSE:NIO) announced strong March deliveries of 35,486 vehicles, marking a 136% year-over-year increase, and reported 83,465 deliveries for the first quarter of 2026, up 98.3% year-over-year. Following these positive results and anticipating future growth, both HSBC and Nomura upgraded their ratings for NIO to "Buy," citing improved visibility, stronger conviction in volume growth, and a healthier operating cycle. The company's cumulative deliveries have now reached 1,081,057 vehicles as of March 31.

feed.title: Buoyed by a Growing Ecosystem of Services and Durable Cost Advantage, Schwab's Future Looks Bright
feed.summary: Charles Schwab's strategy focuses on deepening client relationships, leveraging scale for efficiency, and delivering core services to ensure a bright future. Despite concerns over cash management weighing on its stock, the company continues to achieve robust results. Sean Dunlop highlights Schwab's growing ecosystem of services and its durable cost advantage as key factors for its positive outlook.

feed.title: AgriFood Signals: Nestlé & Soil Capital regen partnership, Unilever buys Grüns, John Deere lawsuit
feed.summary: This article summarizes recent developments in agtech and foodtech, including funding rounds for Agriodor, TechCoop, Clean Food Group, and Culta. It also highlights M&A and partnership activities such as Nestlé's collaboration with Soil Capital, Unilever's acquisition of Grüns, and John Deere's settlement of a right-to-repair lawsuit. The piece covers other news including Kroger's food waste solution and Mondelēz-backed Celleste Bio's cell-cultured cocoa butter debut.

feed.title: Kroger Launches Pearl Street Academy
feed.summary: Kroger has launched Pearl Street Academy, a new comprehensive career development and training platform for its associates. The academy aims to centralize leadership development and professional growth opportunities, named in honor of Kroger's founder, Barney Kroger. This initiative builds on Kroger's existing tuition reimbursement program and commitment to associate development.

feed.title: Schwab Earnings: Cash Management Concerns Weigh on Stock Despite Robust Results
feed.summary: Charles Schwab reported robust quarterly results with 16% sales growth, 38% adjusted EPS growth, and attracted $140 billion in new client assets. Despite these strong figures, the stock traded down due to renewed fears of "cash sorting," specifically concerning a new AI cash management tool from JPMorgan Chase. Morningstar has slightly increased its fair value estimate for Schwab stock to $114 per share, believing the company is a long-term winner due to its low-cost operations and adaptability.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Methanex (NASDAQ:MEOH) Stock
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has increased its price target for Methanex (NASDAQ:MEOH) stock from $52 to $65, maintaining a "market perform" rating and suggesting a 12.08% upside. Despite missing Q4 earnings and revenue expectations, the stock is trading near $58, with significant institutional ownership. Analyst sentiment is mixed but generally positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a average target price of $57 across various firms.

feed.title: Kroger builds new training hub as workers can tap $21,000 tuition aid
feed.summary: The Kroger Co. has launched Pearl Street Academy, a new centralized career development platform offering leadership training and professional growth opportunities for its associates. This initiative reinforces Kroger's commitment to employee development, building on over $64 million already provided in educational support, and includes a tuition reimbursement program of up to $21,000 per associate. The academy is named after founder Barney Kroger's first store and aims to enhance skills, explore new opportunities, and drive impact across the company.

feed.title: Kroger Launches Pearl Street Academy
feed.summary: Kroger has launched Pearl Street Academy, a new comprehensive career development and training platform for its associates. This initiative centralizes leadership development and professional growth opportunities, building on Kroger's legacy and commitment to investing in its employees. The academy, named after the location of Barney Kroger's first store, aims to enhance skills, explore new opportunities, and drive impact, supported by Kroger's existing tuition reimbursement program.

feed.title: US Bancorp Earnings: Good Commercial Loan Growth, but Net Interest Margin Flat in First Quarter
feed.summary: US Bancorp reported "OK" first-quarter earnings with positive operating leverage and strong commercial loan growth, leading Morningstar to plan an increase in its fair value estimate for the company. The bank raised its full-year loan growth guidance to a mid-single-digit range, fueled partly by an upcoming partnership with Amazon's small business card program. Despite some loan growth at lower spreads and a flat net interest margin, US Bancorp's diversified fee income franchise and strategic investments suggest a positive outlook.
